- Centers: orange (O), purple (p), magenta (M)
Maybe the goal is to match the border color to the center color? For example:
- Orange border with orange center
- Purple border with purple center
- White border with... what?
Or maybe the goal is to get all the gray-bordered objects to have white borders?
Let me try a different approach. Let me look at what happens when I click the magenta at (13,42) again. This should move white to (13,42) and move the magenta further along the trail.
